title: scutellaria altissima
intro: Scutellaria altissima, also known as the tall skullcap, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria altissima include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Scutellaria altissima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
